text:

Author: zeising

Log:
  cad/gmsh: Add -fcommon to fix build

  Add -fcommon to cad/gmsh to fix the build on current with llvm 11.
  This is a stop-gap measure since an update which fixes the -fno-common issue
  is waiting for approval.

  PR:		248996
